category_sources: source_facts.description says cppi indents C preprocessor directives to reflect nesting; official GNU page confirms that purpose.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page identifies the project as GNU Cppi.
docs_sources: Official GNU Cppi homepage links online documentation; GNU Cppi manual page is the dedicated manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; GNU Cppi homepage points development sources to Savannah, and Savannah Git conventions use https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/<group>.git for GNU project repositories; FSF directory lists the cppi Savannah repository webview.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and GNU homepage describe indentation/regularization of C preprocessor directives.
